issue_title: when replying to convo, cant select reply from address
issue_body_preview:
occasionally when replying to a convo
the field to select the sending from address errors and is not visible
![image](https://github.com/un/inbox/assets/17185737/7fb3e989-2d15-4498-ac5f-7787fdefcaf1)

when replying, an error is shown with "email identity not valid"

we can replicated this by r
test_description_zh: 在对话中点击回复，观察发送地址选择下拉框是否正常显示，选择一个发送地址后尝试发送回复
expected_result_zh: 回复对话时，发送地址选择字段应正常可见且可交互，用户能够从下拉列表中选择发送地址，选择后不应出现'email identity not valid'错误提示，回复能正常发送
